reasoning: President Zelenskyy has publicly refused to apologize for the February 28 Oval Office incident. Trump acknowledged receiving a letter from Zelenskyy during an address to Congress but framed it as expressing a readiness to improve relations, not as an apology. With the forecast date (March 30) leaving only one day before the deadline, and no recent news indicating an incoming apology or a shifting narrative from Trump, it is highly unlikely to resolve YES.
